content: 算法实现 func InsertionSort(arr []int) []int { for i := 1; i < len(arr); i++ { j := i for j > 0 { if arr[j-1] > arr[j] { arr[j-1], arr[j] = arr[j], arr[j-1] } j = j - 1 } } return arr }
title: Insertion Sort
